title: Create Waxed Outlines
description: Visual waxed copper for Create, to be used with the Vanilla Tweaks resource pack.
body:
Adds the "Visual Waxed Copper (items)" tweak from Vanilla Tweaks to Create's waxed copper blocks.
Intended to be used in addition to the [Vanilla Tweaks pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) (found at `Utility/Visual Waxed Copper (items)`).
